assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 12: 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise -- no exact threshold in Jira description)'; line 13: 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (imprecise -- no exact version in Jira description)'; lines 48-50 explicitly state 'The Jira description provides **imprecise** affected version and fix version data' with 'no numeric threshold' and 'no specific version number'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 7: Source URL 'https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901'; line 16: 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)'; lines 19-20: 'The MITRE CVE record provides a machine-readable `lessThan` constraint: versions **< 0.4.8** are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 23: Source URL 'https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901'; line 34: 'Fixed | 0.4.8'; lines 38-39: 'all versions from 0 up to (but not including) **0.4.8** are affected. Version 0.4.8 is the fix.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 43-49: cross-validation table comparing Jira (imprecise), MITRE (< 0.4.8), and OSV.dev (fixed 0.4.8); lines 52-54: 'Both external sources (MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev) **agree** on the fix threshold'; lines 69-70: 'This enriched fix threshold (< 0.4.8) will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons instead of the imprecise Jira description data.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 5-8: 'Using the enriched fix threshold from Step 1.5: **Affected range**: h2 < 0.4.8 ... **Source**: MITRE CVE API + OSV.dev (cross-validated)'; all version comparisons in the impact table use 0.4.8 as threshold (e.g., '0.4.5 < 0.4.8', '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8'); no imprecise Jira data used for comparisons.
